sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_null (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_null (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 5), (3, NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_null WHERE value IS NULL;
UPDATE test_null SET value = 10 WHERE id = 2 AND value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value IS NULL AS is_null FROM test_null;
